priorityClassName.description: Default priority class for all components

adaptSecurityContext.description: Openshift compatibility option for security context adaptation

fullnameOverride.description: Full name of the Redis HA Resources

nameOverride.description: Name override for Redis HA resources

imagePullSecrets.description: Reference to one or more secrets to be used when pulling redis images

ro_replicas.description: Comma separated list of slaves which never get promoted to be master. Count starts with 0. Allowed values 1-9.

priorityClassName.description: Kubernetes priorityClass name for the redis-ha-server pod

labels.description: Custom labels for the redis pod

labels.description: Custom labels for the redis configmap

repository.description: Repository of the configmap shellcheck test image

tag.description: Tag of the configmap shellcheck test image

resources.description: Resources for the ConfigMap test pod

create.description: Specifies whether a ServiceAccount should be created

name.description: The name of the ServiceAccount to use

automountToken.description: Opt in/out of automounting API credentials into container

annotations.description: Annotations to be added to the service account for the redis statefulset

tlsPort.description: Dedicated TLS port for HAProxy frontend. When set together with haproxy.tls.enabled, plaintext stays on containerPort and TLS binds to tlsPort. When not set, haproxy.tls.enabled replaces plaintext with TLS on containerPort.

keyName.description: Key file name (PEM bundle containing cert and private key)

certMountPath.description: Path to mount the secret that contains the certificates

enabled.description: Enable dedicated port in HAProxy for redis-slaves

additionalPorts.description: Additional ports to expose on HAProxy service and deployment

deploymentStrategy.description: Deployment strategy for the HAProxy deployment

labels.description: Custom labels for the HAProxy pod

imagePullSecrets.description: Reference to one or more secrets to be used when pulling images

podAnnotations.description: Annotations to be added to the HAProxy deployment pods

stickyBalancing.description: HAProxy sticky load balancing to Redis nodes

priorityClassName.description: Kubernetes priorityClass name for the HAProxy pod

loadBalancerSourceRanges.description: List of CIDRs allowed to connect to LoadBalancer

create.description: Specifies whether a ServiceAccount should be created

enabled.description: Use a ServiceMonitor to configure scraping

securityContext.description: Security context for the HAProxy deployment

containerSecurityContext.description: Security context for the HAProxy containers

hardAntiAffinity.description: Whether the HAProxy pods should be forced to run on separate nodes

additionalAffinities.description: Additional affinities to add to the HAProxy pods

affinity.description: Override all other affinity settings for the HAProxy pods

customConfig.description: Custom config-haproxy.cfg file to override default settings

extraConfig.description: Additional configuration section to add to the default config-haproxy.cfg

resources.description: Pod resources for the tests against HAProxy

enabled.description: Enable HAProxy parameters to bind and consume IPv6 addresses
Whether NetworkPolicy for HAProxy should be created

ingressRules.description: User defined ingress rules that HAProxy should permit

egressRules.description: User defined egress rules for HAProxy

enabled.description: Enable an init container to modify Kernel settings

port.description: Port to access the redis service

masterGroupName.description: Redis convention for naming the cluster group

customCommand.description: Allows overriding the redis container command

customArgs.description: Allows overriding the redis container arguments

minReadySeconds.description: Configure the minReadySeconds parameter to StatefulSet

tlsPort.description: TLS Port to access the redis service

authClients.description: Disable client side certificates authentication when set to 'no'

terminationGracePeriodSeconds.description: Increase terminationGracePeriodSeconds to allow writing large RDB snapshots

livenessProbe.description: Liveness probe parameters for redis container

initialDelaySeconds.description: Initial delay in seconds for liveness probe

periodSeconds.description: Period in seconds after which liveness probe will be repeated

readinessProbe.description: Readiness probe parameters for redis container

initialDelaySeconds.description: Initial delay in seconds for readiness probe

periodSeconds.description: Period in seconds after which readiness probe will be repeated

startupProbe.description: Startup probe parameters for redis container

initialDelaySeconds.description: Initial delay in seconds for startup probe

periodSeconds.description: Period in seconds after which startup probe will be repeated

config.description: Any valid redis config options applied to each server. For multi-value configs use list instead of string.

min-replicas-to-write.description: Minimum number of replicas that must acknowledge a write

min-replicas-max-lag.description: Maximum lag in seconds for replica to be considered healthy

maxmemory.description: Max memory to use for each redis instance. Default is unlimited.

maxmemory-policy.description: Max memory policy to use for each redis instance

save.description: Determines if scheduled RDB backups are created

repl-diskless-sync.description: When enabled, directly sends the RDB over the wire to slaves

customConfig.description: Custom redis.conf files to be applied. If used then redis.config is ignored

resources.description: CPU/Memory for master/slave nodes resource requests/limits

lifecycle.description: Container Lifecycle Hooks for redis container

podAnnotations.description: Annotations to be added to the redis statefulset pods

port.description: Port to access the sentinel service

bind.description: Configure the bind directive to bind to a list of network interfaces

tlsPort.description: TLS Port to access the sentinel service

authClients.description: Disable client side certificates authentication when set to 'no'

auth.description: Enables or disables sentinel AUTH (Requires sentinel.password to be set)

password.description: A password that configures a requirepass in the conf parameters

existingSecret.description: An existing secret containing a key defined by sentinel.authKey that configures requirepass

authKey.description: The key holding the sentinel password in an existing secret

customCommand.description: Allows overriding the sentinel container command

customArgs.description: Allows overriding the sentinel container arguments

livenessProbe.description: Liveness probe parameters for sentinel container

initialDelaySeconds.description: Initial delay in seconds for liveness probe

periodSeconds.description: Period in seconds after which liveness probe will be repeated

readinessProbe.description: Readiness probe parameters for sentinel container

initialDelaySeconds.description: Initial delay in seconds for readiness probe

periodSeconds.description: Period in seconds after which readiness probe will be repeated

startupProbe.description: Startup probe parameters for sentinel container

initialDelaySeconds.description: Initial delay in seconds for startup probe

periodSeconds.description: Period in seconds after which startup probe will be repeated

quorum.description: Minimum number of nodes expected to be live

config.description: Valid sentinel config options applied as config options to each sentinel.

down-after-milliseconds.description: Time in milliseconds to consider a node as down

parallel-syncs.description: Number of replicas that can be reconfigured simultaneously during failover

customConfig.description: Custom sentinel.conf files to be applied. If used then sentinel.config is ignored

resources.description: CPU/Memory for sentinel node resource requests/limits

lifecycle.description: Container Lifecycle Hooks for sentinel container

securityContext.description: Security context to be added to the Redis StatefulSet

containerSecurityContext.description: Security context to be added to the Redis containers

hardAntiAffinity.description: Whether the Redis server pods should be forced to run on separate nodes

additionalAffinities.description: Additional affinities to add to the Redis server pods

affinity.description: Override all other affinity settings for the Redis server pods

enabled.description: If true, the prometheus exporter sidecar is enabled

sslEnabled.description: Set to true to connect to redis tls port

script.description: Custom Lua script for collection of custom metrics

enabled.description: Use a ServiceMonitor to configure scraping

namespace.description: Namespace the ServiceMonitor should be deployed in

relabelings.description: RelabelConfigs to apply to samples before scraping

metricRelabelings.description: MetricRelabelConfigs to apply to samples after scraping

auth.description: Configures redis with AUTH (requirepass and masterauth conf params)

redisPassword.description: A password that configures a requirepass and masterauth in the conf parameters (Requires auth: enabled)

existingSecret.description: An existing secret containing a key defined by authKey that configures requirepass and masterauth

authKey.description: Defines the key holding the redis password in existing secret

storageClass.description: redis-ha data Persistent Volume Storage Class

path.description: Use this path on the host for data storage. Path is evaluated as template

chown.description: If true, an init-container with root permissions is launched to change the owner of the hostPath folder

emptyDir.description: Configuration of emptyDir, used only if persistentVolume is disabled and no hostPath specified

secretName.description: Name of secret containing TLS certificates

dhParamsFile.description: Name of Diffie-Hellman (DH) key exchange parameters file

existingSecret.description: Set existingSecret to true to use secret specified in existingSecret above

key.description: SSH private key to scp restore.ssh.source to init container

enabled.description: If true, creates a Prometheus Operator PrometheusRule

additionalLabels.description: Additional labels to be set in metadata

namespace.description: Namespace which Prometheus is running in

interval.description: How often rules in the group are evaluated

extraInitContainers.description: Extra init containers to include in StatefulSet

extraContainers.description: Extra containers to include in StatefulSet

extraVolumes.description: Extra volumes to include in StatefulSet

extraLabels.description: Labels added to all created resources

enabled.description: Whether NetworkPolicy for Redis StatefulSets should be created

ingressRules.description: User defined ingress rules that Redis should permit

egressRules.description: User defined egress rules, uses the same structure as ingressRules

interval.description: Interval between redis sentinel and server split brain checks (in seconds)

retryInterval.description: Retry interval for split brain detection

livenessProbe.description: Liveness probe parameters for split brain container

readinessProbe.description: Readiness probe parameters for split brain container
